derivation: Compiled and ran with g++: cout << n executes before the break test, so n=5,4,3 all print and the break fires after printing 3. Actual program output: 543.
ARP maps a known layer-3 IPv4 address to the layer-2 MAC address on the local link; the reverse mapping (MAC to IP) is RARP, so A is the inverted trap.
IEEE 802 MAC address (EUI-48) is 6 octets = 48 bits; 32 bits is the IPv4 address size, and 64 bits is EUI-64.
MAC = Media Access Control, the lower sublayer of OSI layer 2 (Data Link); the Physical layer carries no addressing.
ATM uses a fixed-size cell: 5-byte header + 48-byte payload = 53 bytes. Stem says 'packet' loosely but ATM's only unit is the 53-byte cell.
BST invariant: node key > all left-subtree keys and < all right-subtree keys (option A). B inverts it, C is a max-heap, D is a balance condition, not a search condition.
True: RAM is organised into cells each holding a unique numeric address, which is exactly what makes direct (random) access possible.
RAM (DRAM/SRAM) loses its contents when power is removed, i.e. volatile; ROM and EPROM are the non-volatile devices listed as distractors.

Among the four, Linux is not a DBMS at all, Access is a desktop file DBMS, and Oracle led SQL Server in commercial DBMS market share / DB-Engines rank in the 2016 era, so Oracle. Subjective and time-dependent stem, but Oracle is the only defensible key.
File server, workstation and PC are all machines; a LAN is a network interconnecting machines, not a computer.

Read the PNG: 2x4 K-map, columns x1x2 = 00,01,11,10 (minterms 0,1,3,2 top / 4,5,7,6 bottom), rows x3 = 0,1. Entire x3=0 row is 1 and entire x3=1 row is 0, so the four 1-cells group into one octet-free quad independent of x1,x2: F = x3'.
Mutual/circular wait where each process blocks on a resource held by the other is deadlock. Starvation is indefinite postponement while the system still progresses, so it is the distractor.
Transport layer (TCP) provides end-to-end reliability: sequencing, ACKs, retransmission, flow control. Data Link only offers hop-by-hop reliability on a single link, which is the intended trap.
Branch / control-flow instructions (JMP, BEQ, CALL, RET) overwrite the program counter, which is what alters program flow; data-transfer and arithmetic leave the PC to increment sequentially.
